textPlain: Roblox may be bad for mental health, especially of children exposed to predators on the platform. Wife of Roblox founder launches a health policy nonprofit to influence Washington. Tax free gains from Roblox can now ensure regulation winds don’t blow its way.
Great, I always wanted to founder of roblox to tell me to go keto /s

If everyone is on keto and has keto breath, that is lots more people alone and playing Roblox.  My girlfriend tried it for a very short time and I couldn't handle her breath smelling like a nail salon.
